requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements for BESS Power Conversion System (PCS / Storage Inverter) — Norway
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统并网要求（储能变流器/PCS侧）——挪威
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統並網要求（儲能變流器／PCS側）——挪威

summary.en: BESS storage inverters (PCS) connecting to Norwegian grids must comply with EN 50549-1 (low voltage, ≤16 A/phase) or EN 50549-2 (medium voltage), which specify requirements for generating plants up to 75 kVA and above connected in parallel with the public distribution network, including voltage/frequency ride-through, reactive power capability, anti-islanding, and reconnection limits. Norway is an EEA member and applies EU law via the EEA Agreement; Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (Requirements for Generators, RfG) sets binding requirements for power-generating modules above national thresholds. Norwegian grid regulations (FIKS — Forskrift om innmating i kraftnettet, administered by NVE) and Statnett's grid codes for the transmission level also apply. Norway's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid matches EEA/EU frequency.
summary.zh: 接入挪威电网的储能变流器（PCS）须符合EN 50549-1（低压，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中压）标准。挪威作为EEA成员，通过EEA协议适用欧盟法律；欧盟委员会法规（EU）2016/631（发电机要求，RfG）对超过国家阈值的发电模块设定具有约束力的要求。挪威电网法规（FIKS——Forskrift om innmating i kraftnettet，由NVE管理）及Statnett的输电层级电网规程同样适用。挪威电网为230/400 V、50 Hz，与EEA/欧盟频率一致。
summary.zht: 接入挪威電網的儲能變流器（PCS）須符合EN 50549-1（低壓，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中壓）標準。挪威作為EEA成員，通過EEA協議適用歐盟法律；歐盟委員會法規（EU）2016/631（發電機要求，RfG）對超過國家閾值的發電模組設定具有約束力的要求。挪威電網法規（FIKS——Forskrift om innmating i kraftnettet，由NVE管理）及Statnett的輸電層級電網規程同樣適用。挪威電網為230/400 V、50 Hz，與EEA/歐盟頻率一致。

standards_or_laws: Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 — Requirements for Generators (RfG), applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement
FIKS — Forskrift om innmating i kraftnettet (Norwegian grid injection regulation, administered by NVE)
Statnett grid codes for transmission-connected generation and storage (statnett.no)

summary.en: In China, grid-connected storage inverters (PCS) are governed primarily by GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System), which superseded GB/T 34120-2017. The 2023 revision extended the AC output voltage upper limit to 35 kV, added fault ride-through (LVRT/HVRT) and primary frequency response requirements, and updated product classification. The National Energy Administration (NEA) and grid companies (State Grid / Southern Grid) also issue enterprise standards (Q/GDW series) for energy storage grid connection.
summary.zh: 中国并网储能变流器（PCS）主要依据GB/T 34120-2023《电化学储能系统储能变流器技术要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017）。2023年修订版将交流输出电压上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次调频要求，并更新了产品分类。国家能源局及电网企业（国家电网/南方电网）还发布Q/GDW系列企业标准用于储能并网。
summary.zht: 中國並網儲能變流器（PCS）主要依據GB/T 34120-2023《電化學儲能系統儲能變流器技術要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017）。2023年修訂版將交流輸出電壓上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次調頻要求，並更新了產品分類。國家能源局及電網企業（國家電網／南方電網）還發布Q/GDW系列企業標準用於儲能並網。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34120-2023 — Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System (SAMR/SAC; supersedes GB/T 34120-2017; recommended national standard)
Q/GDW 1564-2014 (State Grid enterprise standard — verify current supersession status with State Grid or SAC)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 34120 is not accepted as equivalent to EN 50549-1/-2 or the Norwegian FIKS/NVE grid regulations for EEA market access. PCS units exported from China must be re-tested and re-certified to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 by a recognised test laboratory (typically accredited under EA/DAkkS/UKAS or NOFO), and must satisfy the applicable Norwegian grid code. The EU RfG Regulation (2016/631) is directly applicable in Norway via the EEA Agreement; Chinese type-test reports against GB/T 34120 are not substitutable. Key technical gaps include different voltage/frequency ride-through profiles, reactive power Q(U) curves, reconnection delay settings, and communication protocol requirements.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 34120不被EEA/挪威市场认可为EN 50549-1/-2或挪威FIKS/NVE电网法规的等效标准。从中国出口的储能变流器须经认可检测实验室（通常经EA/DAkkS/UKAS或NOFO认可）重新测试并取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2认证，并须满足挪威国家电网规程。欧盟法规（EU）2016/631通过EEA协议在挪威具有直接效力；依据GB/T 34120出具的中国型式试验报告不可替代。主要技术差距包括：电压/频率穿越曲线不同、无功功率Q(U)曲线不同、重新并网延迟设置不同，以及通信协议要求不同。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 34120不被EEA/挪威市場認可為EN 50549-1/-2或挪威FIKS/NVE電網法規的等效標準。從中國出口的儲能變流器須經認可檢測實驗室（通常經EA/DAkkS/UKAS或NOFO認可）重新測試並取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2認證，並須滿足挪威國家電網規程。歐盟法規（EU）2016/631通過EEA協議在挪威具有直接效力；依據GB/T 34120出具的中國型式試驗報告不可替代。主要技術差距包括：電壓／頻率穿越曲線不同、無功功率Q(U)曲線不同、重新並網延遲設置不同，以及通訊協議要求不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 50549-1/-2 are harmonised standards supporting applicable EEA directives and national grid codes; EU RfG 2016/631 is directly binding in Norway via the EEA Agreement; FIKS and NVE/Statnett grid codes are mandatory for grid connection approval in Norway.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid connection in China — GB/T 34120-2023 is a recommended national standard (推荐性国标) but compliance is effectively required by State Grid / Southern Grid connection rules.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PCS / storage inverters certified only to GB/T 34120 are NOT compliant for Norwegian/EEA grid connection. Full re-testing to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 and the applicable Norwegian grid code (FIKS/NVE/Statnett) is required before connecting to any Norwegian grid. Engage an accredited EEA test laboratory early in the product development cycle.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T 34120认证的中国储能变流器不符合挪威/EEA并网要求。在接入任何挪威电网之前，须完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2及适用挪威电网规程（FIKS/NVE/Statnett）的完整重新测试。建议在产品开发周期早期联系经认可的EEA检测实验室。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T 34120認證的中國儲能變流器不符合挪威/EEA並網要求。在接入任何挪威電網之前，須完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2及適用挪威電網規程（FIKS/NVE/Statnett）的完整重新測試。建議在產品開發週期早期聯繫經認可的EEA檢測實驗室。
